ddls:
CREATE TABLE "newspapers" (
  "newspaper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newspaper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the newspaper */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the newspaper */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the newspaper is published */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the newspaper was first published */,
  "cease_year" INTEGER /* Year the newspaper ceased publication (if applicable) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Publication frequency (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the newspaper */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the newspaper's website (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("newspaper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newspaper issue */,
  "newspaper_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the newspaper title */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of publication */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of publication */,
  "issue_number" INTEGER /* Issue number within the year */,
  "volume_number" INTEGER /* Volume number of the issue */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Full date of the issue (YYYY-MM-DD) */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the issue */,
  "cover_image_path" TEXT /* File path to the cover image of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_newspaper_id FOREIGN KEY ("newspaper_id") REFERENCES newspapers ("newspaper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the newspaper issue */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "filename" TEXT /* File path of the digitized article */,
  "article_order" INTEGER /* Order of the article in the issue */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the article type */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the article */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES article_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the article type (e.g., news, editorial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the article type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the accessed article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the article */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (e.g., time spent viewing the article) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the article */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the article */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created or modified */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version change (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "version_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
